race.comment: DELICATE WARRIOR (2) is hard to knock on his recent form, missing by 0.8L at this track and trip most recently. He's on the cusp of his maiden win, with a much better barrier this time around being a massive tick. Can sit closer and if he runs up to his latest effort, he can go one better. ROCKING IN VEGAS (1) flew home to bump into a good one before sitting up front last start and missing by 0.7L. Back slightly in trip won't be an issue and the barrier gives Dyson options. Racing well and his maiden win doesn't look far away. ADROIT (5) finished behind a handy type last start when 3.5L away, but he was clearly second best. The wide draw won't be an issue and with a touch of luck in running, he'll be hard to hold out. RARE HONOR (3) won't be far away if he runs to recent form. MAJOR MAGNUS (4) is next best.
